data-part vocab filter (Ark exposes more parts than Kumo)

attempts.openRemaining: open:390/768 partPx 3.5%: canonical menu shows a BLUE FOCUS RING (menu auto-focused on open -> ring-kumo-line renders as focus color); native Ark menu has tabindex=0 (focusable) but the headless capture did not trigger/settle the auto-focus, so :focus-visible ring is absent. open:1440 already passes (partPx=0) -> the menu renders correctly; this is purely the focus-on-open visual state at smaller viewports.
